name: Baked Chile Relleno Ala Weight Watchers
recipeIngredient: Canned whole small green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 6-inch au gratin dish with nonstick spray. Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg white and salt until stiff.
3. Lightly beat egg yolk; fold into egg whites.
4. Spread half the mixture in prepared dish. Open chile and place flat on top; sprinkle with cheese. Spread remaining egg mixture on top to make an even layer.
5. Bake until golden brown and center is set, 15-20 minutes. Serve with salsa if desired.
Source: Weight Watchers Magazine, Feb. 1993
Each serving provides: 2 proteins, 1/2 vegetable, 20 optional calories. Per serving: 188 calories.
